name: Rocket Pool
special_mechanism_summary: rETH is a non-rebasing accumulating token: the exchange rate rETH.getExchangeRate() increases over time as staking rewards accrue. Node operators must post both ETH and RPL collateral, making RPL a protocol-level collateral asset. The Saturn upgrade (Feb 2026) introduced MEV smoothing and new validator lifecycle hooks.
notes: C3' combination potential: rETH exchange rate updates are visible on-chain and updated less frequently than market prices — window between updates creates predictable arbitrage when on-chain rate diverges from market; rETH used as collateral in Aave/MakerDAO so rate-update timing affects liquidation thresholds; RPL collateral requirement means RPL price manipulation could cause validator exits, affecting rETH supply.
